text:
Interpretation of statutes – Rule of interpretation:
Held: Every interpretation of statute must be undertaken by 
considering the statute in its entirety, the prior state of the law, 
other statutes in pari materia, the general scope and purpose 
of the legislation, and the mischief that the legislature intended 
to address – It is essential not only to consider the words used 
but also to examine the statement of objects and reasons. 
[Paras 43, 44]
